_meta.purpose: Data-driven suppression of measured-dead reference docs: a doc that keeps routing but a retrieval measurement shows is never actually used can be dropped from routing by listing its basename here.
_meta.semantics: docs listed in 'suppressed' are removed from routing AFTER signal merge and BEFORE mandatory force-inject; a MANDATORY marker force-inject bypasses this registry; manual Read is unaffected; the loader is fail-open (a missing/malformed file suppresses nothing).
_meta.how_to_populate: leave empty until you have a real retrieval eval. Then, from your own gitignored reference/.router-eval/injection-log.jsonl, list basenames with many injections and zero downstream use; re-measure the zero-route 'suppressed' signal after each change.
